markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Marko Arnautovic records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Marko Arnautovic: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.

markets.title: Nicolas Otamendi: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nico Gonzalez records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026. markets.title: Nico Gonzalez: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Marko Arnautovic records the first goal for Austria during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Austria professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: Marko Arnautovic: Austria First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Yuta Kawahashi wins the Chen vs Kawahashi professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Wuning Round of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Chen vs Kawahashi professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Wuning Round of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Yuta Kawahashi win the Chen vs Kawahashi: M15 Wuning Round of 32 match?
